instruction: Plan the rebalancing of account 14: reassign its open cases 40, 62, 63 and 118 to agent 8, setting each case's priority to 'Medium' in the same update, then email agent 8 once with subject 'Account 14 cases reassigned' and a brief body, and finish with an event named 'Handover sync' on 2026-06-30 with agent 8 as attendee. Do not close any case.
rationale_hint: Four bundled two-field updates; exactly one email despite four cases (count discipline).

provenance.source_benchmark: PlanBench (Valmeekam et al., 2023); FlowBench plan-generation variant (Xiao et al., 2024); WorkArena L2 compositional (Boisvert et al., 2024)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed scenario over the local CRM seed; mechanical plan validation, plan-length difficulty, and temperature 0 follow PlanBench; plan-generation framing follows FlowBench and WorkArena L2. No benchmark text or data is reproduced. Sub-class: bulk_reassign.
provenance.license: Original work by the author (scenarios, goal specs, action doc); benchmark semantics reference only
